'''fozabaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:azotaemic|azotaemic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-z-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:azotaemic|azotaemic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| fozabaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || fozabithi || fozabiji || fozabishi || fozabiki
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || fozabuthu || fozabuju || fozabushu || fozabuku
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || fozabuthu || fozabuju || fozabushu || fozabuku
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || fozabufthuf || fozabufjuf || fozabufshuf || fozabufkuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || fozabethe || fozabeje || fozabeshe || fozabeke
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || fozabotho || fozabojo || fozabosho || fozaboko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || fozabotho || fozabojo || fozabosho || fozaboko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || fozabofthof || fozabofjof || fozabofshof || fozabofkof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || fozabïfthïf || fozabïfjïf || fozabïfshïf || fozabïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || fozabïfthïf || fozabïfjïf || fozabïfshïf || fozabïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || fozabïfthïf || fozabïfjïf || fozabïfshïf || fozabïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || fozabïfthïf || fozabïfjïf || fozabïfshïf || fozabïfkïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || fozabæthæ || fozabæjæ || fozabæshæ || fozabækæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || fozabatha || fozabaja || fozabasha || fozabaka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || fozabatha || fozabaja || fozabasha || fozabaka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || fozabafthaf || fozabafjaf || fozabafshaf || fozabafkaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || fozabasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || fozabshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || fozabroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || fozabmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || fozabyaasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gofozabnkshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gofozabnkroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gofozabnkmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gofozabnkyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].none || fozazabasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || fozazabshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || fozazabroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || fozazabmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || fozazabyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gofozazabnkshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gofozazabnkroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gofozazabnkmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gofozazabnkyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].none || fezæbasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || fezæbshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || fezæbroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || fezæbmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || fezæbyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gofezæbnkshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gofezæbnkroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gofezæbnkmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gofezæbnkyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].none || fozfabasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || fozfabshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || fozfabroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || fozfabmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || fozfabyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gofozfabnkshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gofozfabnkroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gofozfabnkmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gofozfabnkyaasha
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
